results.title: Ensure DNS server is configured
results.description: Verify that DNS servers are configured for name resolution.

results.title: Ensure intra-zone traffic is restricted
results.description: Intra-zone traffic should be denied by default to enforce segmentation.

results.title: Ensure management services are disabled on WAN port
results.description: Management services (HTTP, Telnet) should be disabled on WAN interfaces.
results.expected_value: No insecure management services on WAN ports
results.actual_value: Insecure services: wan1: http, fgfm; wan2: fgfm
results.remediation: Remove HTTP/Telnet from WAN interface allowaccess
results.remediation_cli:
config system interface
  edit <wan_port>
    set allowaccess ping https ssh
  next
end

results.title: Ensure Pre-Login Banner is set
results.description: A pre-login banner warns unauthorized users before authentication.
results.remediation: Enable pre-login banner in system global settings
results.remediation_cli:
config system global
  set pre-login-banner enable
end

results.title: Ensure management GUI listens on secure TLS version
results.description: Management GUI should only accept TLS 1.2 or higher.

results.title: Ensure CDN is enabled for improved GUI performance
results.description: CDN improves GUI loading performance for distributed management.
results.remediation_cli:
config system global
  set gui-cdn enable
end

results.title: Ensure Post-Login Banner is set
results.description: A post-login banner provides legal notice after authentication.
results.remediation: Enable post-login banner in system global settings
results.remediation_cli:
config system global
  set post-login-banner enable
end

results.title: Ensure timezone is properly configured
results.description: Correct timezone ensures accurate log timestamps for forensic analysis.

results.title: Ensure correct system time is configured through NTP
results.description: NTP ensures accurate and synchronized time across devices.

results.title: Ensure hostname is set
results.description: A meaningful hostname helps identify the device in logs and monitoring.

results.title: Ensure the latest firmware is installed
results.description: Running latest firmware ensures all security patches are applied.

results.title: Ensure USB firmware and configuration installation is disabled
results.description: USB auto-install should be disabled to prevent unauthorized firmware changes.
results.actual_value: usb-auto-install not explicitly set (defaults to enable)
results.remediation: Disable USB auto-install in system global
results.remediation_cli:
config system global
  set usb-auto-install disable
end

results.title: Ensure static keys for TLS are disabled
results.description: Enable strong-crypto to disable weak static key cipher suites.

results.title: Ensure Global Strong Encryption is enabled
results.description: Strong encryption ensures all management communications use secure ciphers.

results.title: Ensure Password Policy is enabled
results.description: Password policy enforces complexity requirements for admin accounts.
results.remediation: Configure password policy with minimum length and complexity
results.remediation_cli:
config system password-policy
  set status enable
  set min-length 8
  set min-upper-case-letter 1
  set min-lower-case-letter 1
  set min-number 1
  set min-non-alphanumeric 1
end

results.title: Ensure administrator password retries and lockout are configured
results.description: Account lockout prevents brute-force attacks on admin accounts.

results.title: Ensure only SNMPv3 is enabled
results.description: SNMPv1/v2 send community strings in cleartext. Only SNMPv3 should be used.
results.remediation_cli:
config system snmp sysinfo
  set status enable
end

results.title: Ensure Monitor Interfaces for HA devices is enabled
results.description: Monitor interfaces trigger failover when a monitored link goes down.

results.title: Ensure HA Reserved Management Interface is configured
results.description: Reserved management interface allows direct access during HA failover.
results.actual_value: HA reserved management interface not configured
results.remediation_cli:
config system ha
  set ha-mgmt-status enable
  config ha-mgmt-interfaces
    edit 1
      set interface <mgmt_port>
      set gateway <gateway_ip>
    next
  end
end

results.title: Ensure idle timeout time is configured
results.description: Admin sessions should timeout after inactivity to prevent unauthorized access.

results.title: Ensure only encrypted access channels are enabled
results.description: Only encrypted protocols (HTTPS, SSH) should be used for management.
results.expected_value: SSH v1 disabled, HTTPS redirect enabled
results.actual_value: SSH v1 disabled, HTTPS redirect enabled

results.title: Ensure Local-in Policies are applied
results.description: Local-in policies control traffic destined to the FortiGate itself.
results.remediation: Configure local-in policies to restrict management traffic
results.remediation_cli:
config firewall local-in-policy
  edit 1
    set intf <interface>
    set srcaddr <allowed_hosts>
    set dstaddr all
    set action accept
    set service <mgmt_services>
    set schedule always
  next
end

results.title: Ensure default Admin ports are changed
results.description: Changing default admin ports reduces automated scanning attacks.
results.actual_value: Default ports in use: HTTP port=80, HTTPS port=443, SSH port=22
results.remediation: Change HTTP, HTTPS, and SSH admin ports from defaults
results.remediation_cli:
config system global
  set admin-port 8080
  set admin-sport 8443
  set admin-ssh-port 2222
end

results.title: Ensure High Availability configuration is enabled
results.description: HA ensures service continuity during device failures.

results.title: Ensure policies do not use 'ALL' as Service
results.description: Using 'ALL' as service allows unrestricted traffic through the policy.
results.remediation: Replace 'ALL' service with specific required services
results.remediation_cli:
config firewall policy
  edit <policy_id>
    set service <specific_services>
  next
end

results.title: Ensure Tor and malicious traffic is blocked using ISDB
results.description: Block known Tor exit nodes and malicious IP databases.
results.actual_value: No explicit Tor/malicious traffic blocking found
results.remediation: Create deny policy using Internet Service Database for Tor
results.remediation_cli:
config firewall policy
  edit <id>
    set internet-service enable
    set internet-service-id <tor_isdb_id>
    set action deny
  next
end

results.title: Ensure logging is enabled on all firewall policies
results.description: All firewall policies should have traffic logging enabled for audit trails.

results.title: Ensure Botnet connections are detected
results.description: Botnet connection scanning detects compromised endpoints.
results.remediation: Enable botnet connection scanning on interfaces
results.remediation_cli:
config system interface
  edit <interface>
    set scan-botnet-connections block
  next
end

results.title: Ensure IPS Security Profile is applied to policies
results.description: IPS detects and prevents network-based attacks.

results.title: Ensure Antivirus Definition Push Updates are configured
results.description: Antivirus definitions must be updated regularly to detect new threats.
results.actual_value: Antivirus configured but updates not scheduled
results.remediation_cli:
config antivirus settings
  set default-db extended
end

results.title: Ensure Outbreak Prevention Database is enabled
results.description: Outbreak prevention provides rapid response to new threats.
results.remediation: Enable outbreak prevention in antivirus settings
results.remediation_cli:
config antivirus profile
  edit <profile_name>
    set outbreak-prevention enable
  next
end

results.title: Ensure AI/heuristic-based malware detection is enabled
results.description: AI-based detection catches zero-day and unknown malware variants.
results.remediation_cli:
config antivirus profile
  edit <profile_name>
    config content-disarm
      set machine-learning-detection enable
    end
  next
end

results.title: Ensure Grayware detection on antivirus is enabled
results.description: Grayware includes potentially unwanted programs and adware.

results.title: Ensure inline scanning with sandbox is enabled
results.description: Sandbox analysis detects advanced threats through behavioral analysis.
results.remediation_cli:
config system fortisandbox
  set status enable
  set server <sandbox_ip>
end

results.title: Ensure Botnet C&C Domain Blocking DNS Filter is enabled
results.description: DNS filtering blocks known C&C domain resolutions.

results.title: Ensure logging is enabled on DNS Filter
results.description: DNS filter logging captures DNS-based threat intelligence.
results.actual_value: DNS filter logging not fully enabled
results.remediation: Enable logging on DNS filter profiles
results.remediation_cli:
config dnsfilter profile
  edit <profile_name>
    set log-all-domain enable
  next
end

results.title: Ensure high-risk web categories are blocked
results.description: Block access to malicious, phishing, and high-risk web categories.

results.title: Ensure logging is enabled on Application Control
results.description: Application control logging provides visibility into app usage.

results.title: Ensure Application Control Security Profile is applied
results.description: Application control identifies and controls network applications.

results.title: Ensure SSL/SSH inspection is configured
results.description: Deep SSL inspection ensures encrypted traffic is inspected for threats.

results.title: Ensure Web Filtering is enabled
results.description: Web filtering blocks access to malicious and inappropriate websites.

results.title: Ensure Content Disarm & Reconstruction is enabled
results.description: CDR removes potentially malicious content from files.

results.title: Ensure Email Filtering is configured
results.description: Email filtering blocks spam, phishing, and malicious attachments.

results.title: Ensure File Filtering is configured
results.description: File filtering blocks dangerous file types from being transferred.

results.title: Ensure Compromised Host Quarantine is enabled
results.description: Quarantine automatically isolates compromised hosts on the network.
results.remediation_cli:
config system global
  set quarantine enable
end

results.title: Ensure Security Fabric is configured
results.description: Security Fabric provides coordinated security across Fortinet devices.
results.remediation_cli:
config system csf
  set status enable
  set group-name <name>
end

results.title: Ensure trusted signed certificate is used for VPN portal
results.description: Factory certificates should be replaced with trusted CA-signed certs.

results.title: Ensure limited TLS versions for SSL VPN
results.description: SSL VPN should enforce TLS 1.2 or higher.
results.actual_value: SSL VPN TLS version: not restricted
results.remediation: Set SSL VPN minimum TLS version to 1.2
results.remediation_cli:
config vpn ssl settings
  set ssl-min-proto-ver tls1-2
end

results.title: Ensure IPsec VPN uses AES-256 encryption
results.description: IPsec Phase 1 should use AES-256 or stronger encryption.

results.title: Ensure IPsec VPN uses strong DH group
results.description: Diffie-Hellman group should be 14 or higher for key exchange.
results.actual_value: IPsec DH group may be weak
results.remediation_cli:
config vpn ipsec phase1-interface
  edit <tunnel>
    set dhgrp 14 19 20 21
  next
end

results.title: Ensure Event Logging is enabled
results.description: Event logging captures security events for analysis and forensics.
results.remediation_cli:
config log disk setting
  set status enable
  set diskfull overwrite
end

results.title: Ensure logs sent to FortiAnalyzer/FortiManager are encrypted
results.description: Log transmission should be encrypted to prevent eavesdropping.

results.title: Ensure Log Transmission to FortiAnalyzer/FortiManager is enabled
results.description: Centralized logging via FortiAnalyzer enables SIEM correlation.
results.remediation_cli:
config log fortianalyzer setting
  set status enable
  set server <FAZ_IP>
end

results.title: Ensure Centralized Logging and Reporting (Syslog) is enabled
results.description: Syslog enables centralized logging to external SIEM systems.
results.remediation_cli:
config log syslogd setting
  set status enable
  set server <syslog_ip>
end
